Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.functional

Interface FlixelShakeable

All Known Subinterfaces:
FlixelWindow
All Known Implementing Classes:
FlixelAnimateSprite, FlixelBar, FlixelNoopWindow, FlixelObject, FlixelSprite, FlixelSpriteGroup, FlixelText
public interface FlixelShakeable
Something FlixelShakeTween can jitter and restore without caring whether the underlying channel is a sprite graphic offset, a world position, or a desktop window position.

Implementations choose what X and Y mean: FlixelSprite uses graphic offset; FlixelObject uses world position; FlixelWindow uses window placement in screen coordinates.

See Also:
  • FlixelShakeTween

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default float
    getShakeHeight()
    Height used to scale FlixelShakeUnit.FRACTION on the Y axis.
    default float
    getShakeWidth()
    Width used to scale FlixelShakeUnit.FRACTION on the X axis.
    float
    getShakeX()
    Current shake channel X (for example graphic offset or world X).
    float
    getShakeY()
    Current shake channel Y.
    void
    setShake(float x, float y)
    Sets the shake channel to absolute coordinates (typically base plus jitter).
    default float
    shakeFractionHeightFromGraphics()
    Convenience default for fullscreen targets: uses the back buffer size when libGDX graphics is available.
    default float
    shakeFractionWidthFromGraphics()
    Convenience default for fullscreen targets: uses the back buffer size when libGDX graphics is available.

  • Method Details

    • getShakeX

      float getShakeX()
      Current shake channel X (for example graphic offset or world X).
      Returns:
      Shake X before jitter is applied.

    • getShakeY

      float getShakeY()
      Current shake channel Y.
      Returns:
      Shake Y before jitter is applied.

    • setShake

      void setShake(float x, float y)
      Sets the shake channel to absolute coordinates (typically base plus jitter).
      Parameters:
      x - New shake X.
      y - New shake Y.

    • getShakeWidth

      default float getShakeWidth()
      Width used to scale FlixelShakeUnit.FRACTION on the X axis. Values 0 or less mean the tween treats intensity like plain pixels on that axis.
      Returns:
      Reference width for fractional shake, or non-positive to fall back.

    • getShakeHeight

      default float getShakeHeight()
      Height used to scale FlixelShakeUnit.FRACTION on the Y axis. Values 0 or less mean the tween treats intensity like plain pixels on that axis.
      Returns:
      Reference height for fractional shake, or non-positive to fall back.

    • shakeFractionWidthFromGraphics

      default float shakeFractionWidthFromGraphics()
      Convenience default for fullscreen targets: uses the back buffer size when libGDX graphics is available.
      Returns:
      Positive width in pixels, or 0f if unknown.

    • shakeFractionHeightFromGraphics

      default float shakeFractionHeightFromGraphics()
      Convenience default for fullscreen targets: uses the back buffer size when libGDX graphics is available.
      Returns:
      Positive height in pixels, or 0f if unknown.
